major_mechanics.name: Displacement
major_mechanics.when: Occurs regularly throughout the fight, especially after Cairn teleports.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Cairn raises his arm and a glowing line appears indicating the direction of the teleport.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Quickly reposition after each teleport to maintain stack and avoid being caught out of range.
major_mechanics.failure: Players left behind take heavy damage or die from subsequent mechanics.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players not reacting to teleports; running in the wrong direction; losing uptime.

major_mechanics.name: Shared Agony
major_mechanics.when: Applied periodically to a random player.
major_mechanics.watch_for: A tether appears linking the afflicted player to the group.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: The tethered player should stand slightly away from the group but not too far to avoid lethal damage.
major_mechanics.failure: If the tether is stretched too far, the afflicted player dies instantly.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players running too far away; stacking too close and causing unnecessary damage.

minor_mechanics.name: Orb Spawns
minor_mechanics.summary: Orbs appear and must be avoided to prevent damage.

major_mechanics.name: Mosaic Tiles
major_mechanics.when: Active throughout the fight as safe and unsafe tiles rotate.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Tiles glow with shifting patterns indicating safe zones.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Move to safe tiles as they appear while maintaining DPS on the boss.
major_mechanics.failure: Standing on unsafe tiles deals heavy damage and can quickly down players.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players tunneling on DPS; moving too late; misreading tile patterns.

major_mechanics.name: Jade Soldiers
major_mechanics.when: Spawn at regular intervals and march across the arena.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Jade constructs emerging from portals and walking in straight lines.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Avoid their paths entirely; do not attempt to tank or kill them.
major_mechanics.failure: Being touched by a Jade Soldier results in instant death.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players dodging into soldier paths; standing too close to spawn points.

minor_mechanics.name: Overhead Slam
minor_mechanics.summary: A large slam attack requires players to dodge or block.

major_mechanics.name: Guldhem and Rigom
major_mechanics.watch_for: Samarog becomes invulnerable and the two adds spawn on opposite sides.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: CC Guldhem, kite Rigom into him, and kill them in the correct sequence.
major_mechanics.failure: If Rigom dies too far from Guldhem, the phase resets.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players killing Rigom too early; poor CC timing; failing to kite properly.

major_mechanics.name: Impaling Stab
major_mechanics.watch_for: Samarog targets a player and performs a long, telegraphed thrust.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: The targeted player must dodge or block the attack; allies should avoid standing in the line.
major_mechanics.failure: Being hit results in a stun and heavy damage, often leading to death.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players not noticing the targeting animation; standing behind the targeted player.

major_mechanics.name: Shockwaves
major_mechanics.when: Triggered after Samarog performs a large slam attack.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Circular shockwaves radiating outward from Samarog.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Jump or dodge each shockwave to avoid damage.
major_mechanics.failure: Taking multiple shockwaves can down or kill players.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players mistiming jumps; dodging too early; standing too close to Samarog.

major_mechanics.name: Black Oil
major_mechanics.when: Spawns periodically throughout the fight, especially during later phases.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Black puddles forming beneath players or at random locations.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Place oil away from the group and avoid standing in it.
major_mechanics.failure: Oil expands and deals heavy damage, overwhelming the arena.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players dropping oil in the stack; placing oil near Saul or key positions.

major_mechanics.name: Hand Kiting
major_mechanics.when: Hands spawn regularly and fixate on a designated player.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Shadowy hands emerging from the ground and moving toward the kiter.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: The kiter must move in a controlled path away from the group while avoiding oil.
major_mechanics.failure: Hands reaching the group cause massive damage and chaos.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Kiter running through the group; hands being dragged into oil or mechanics.

major_mechanics.name: Mind Crush
major_mechanics.when: Occurs at fixed intervals throughout the fight.
major_mechanics.watch_for: Deimos raises his arms and a large red AoE appears on the ground.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Stack tightly to share the damage and use defensive cooldowns.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players standing too far away; dodging out of the stack; late stacking.

major_mechanics.name: Saul Phases
major_mechanics.watch_for: Saul gaining new behaviors such as gambling, drinking, or summoning adds.
major_mechanics.what_to_do: Manage adds, interrupt Saul’s dangerous abilities, and maintain control of the arena.
major_mechanics.failure: Unmanaged adds overwhelm the group or Saul dies prematurely.
major_mechanics.common_mistakes: Players ignoring adds; failing to interrupt; poor positioning during transitions.

minor_mechanics.name: Greater Death Mark
minor_mechanics.summary: A large AoE requires coordinated movement to avoid group damage.

minor_mechanics.name: Shackles
minor_mechanics.summary: Players are tethered together and must coordinate movement to break the link.
